name: io.github.chrischall/alltrails-mcp
description: Unofficial AllTrails MCP for Claude — search trails, get details, reviews, photos, saved lists

environmentVariables.name: ALLTRAILS_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: Optional escape hatch: a Cookie header from a signed-in alltrails.com session (must include the datadome cookie), sent via direct Node requests. Default (omitted): every request routes through the user's signed-in alltrails.com tab via the fetchproxy browser extension.

environmentVariables.name: ALLTRAILS_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional numeric AllTrails user id for the per-user tools (saved lists, completed trails, feed). If omitted, those tools resolve the signed-in user via /api/alltrails/me.
